name: CJ Links Indoor Golf
about: CJ Links Indoor Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue that offers a flexible and accessible golfing experience. It features state-of-the-art simulators for play, practice, and events. The venue operates on a mixed pricing model, offering both public hourly rates and a monthly membership program for regular players. It is best suited for casual rounds, group events, and individual practice sessions in a relaxed social atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible monthly membership offering savings on hourly play with no contracts
State-of-the-art simulators ideal for events and casual play
Variety of payment options and online booking for convenience

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, BYOB likely
No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB likely

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available or if you must bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state a policy on outside food and drinks, but it does not mention an on-site kitchen or bar, suggesting BYOB may be allowed.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the average time it takes to complete 18 holes on their simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, CJ Links Indoor Golf appears to be kid-friendly, as it is mentioned as a suitable venue for birthday parties and family get-togethers.
